ICandidateConfigServiceAddDataSourceUrl Method

One Identity Manager API Server
Configures a link between a method parameter and the specified data source URL.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.Definition
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
void AddDataSourceUrl(
	IMethod method,
	string parameterName,
	string url
)

Parameters

method
Type: QBM.CompositionApi.DefinitionIMethod
parameterName
Type: SystemString
url
Type: SystemString
Remarks
A method with the specified URL must be declared separately. If the specified method is not declared, or if it is not a CRUD method, an error will be generated.
See Also

Reference

ICandidateConfigService Interface
